name: PLAYHAUS — LIVE AT MIR SCENE OSLO
description:
PLAYHAUS — LIVE AT MIR SCENE OSLO

PLAYHAUS returns! LIVE at MIR Scene Oslo with a curated drag show built on collaboration.

⭐️𝗢𝗦𝗟𝗢 𝗕𝗔𝗦𝗘𝗗 𝗗𝗥𝗔𝗚 𝗖𝗢𝗟𝗟𝗘𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗩𝗘⭐️
𝘽𝙤𝙣𝙣𝙞𝙚 • 𝙀𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙖 • 𝙂𝙞𝙜𝙞 • 𝙆𝙚𝙝𝙢𝙞𝙨𝙝𝙖
𝙇𝙖𝙧𝙮𝙣 • 𝙈𝙤𝙨𝙨 • 𝙉𝙖𝙣𝙘𝙮 • 𝙉𝙤𝙫𝙚𝙡𝙩𝙮
𝙋𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙤𝙡 • 𝙑𝙞𝙡𝙮𝙖 • 𝙔𝙚𝙨𝙨𝙞𝙘𝙖

8 drag artists come together shaping the night as a collective. There’s a bit of everything. Expect pop divas, iconic musical numbers, and performances that shift in tone and energy throughout the night.

As the drag scene in Oslo continues to grow, Playhaus steps in to take up space and add something new to it. On its own terms.

Join us for a night of FIERCE drag entertainment at MIR!
Stage: MIR Scene Oslo
Time: 19.00

Featuring:

• Elita Pike
• Gïgï Moore
• Hey Pistol
• Laryn-Gitis
• Necro Nancy
• Novelty Starr
• Vilya Dumi
• Yessica

Original pics by @karinathedragphotographer 

CC : 210,-
